name: ng-blatui
title: ng-blatui MCP
description: Discover and correctly use ng-blatui — an accessible Angular UI library (Angular 21 & 22, standalone, signals, zoneless, SSR-ready). Search 155 components, 16 blocks, 70 charts and 34 page templates, and read each component's typed API (inputs, two-way models, outputs and the interfaces/types it uses).

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List components, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Keyword search across the whole catalog.

tools.name: get_docs
tools.description: Install, import and the full structured API of a component/block/chart/template.

tools.name: get_api
tools.description: Just the typed API (inputs, two-way models, outputs, types) of a component.
